definitions.usage_example: He is receiving treatment for cancer.
definitions.usage_example_es: Él está recibiendo tratamiento para el cáncer.
definitions.usage_context_en: Medical care given to a patient for an illness or injury.
definitions.usage_context_es: Atención médica dada a un paciente por una enfermedad o lesión.

definitions.usage_example: His treatment of his employees is bad.
definitions.usage_example_es: Su trato hacia sus empleados es malo.
definitions.usage_context_en: The way one behaves toward or deals with someone or something.
definitions.usage_context_es: La forma en que uno se comporta o trata a alguien o algo.

definitions.usage_example: The doctor gave a clear diagnosis.
definitions.usage_example_es: El médico dio un diagnóstico claro.
definitions.usage_context_en: The identification of a disease or problem.
definitions.usage_context_es: The identification of a disease or problem.

definitions.usage_context_en: A forecast of how a condition will develop.
definitions.usage_context_es: A forecast of how a condition will develop.

definitions.usage_example: Rest is the best remedy in this case.
definitions.usage_example_es: El descanso es el mejor remedio en este caso.
definitions.usage_context_en: Something that improves or cures a problem.
definitions.usage_context_es: Something that improves or cures a problem.

definitions.usage_example: He returned to work after rehabilitation.
definitions.usage_example_es: Volvió al trabajo después de la rehabilitación.
definitions.usage_context_en: The process of recovering abilities or health.
definitions.usage_context_es: The process of recovering abilities or health.
